agent1: heads up, I already modified ImageOps.py's exif_transpose XMP-handling block (inside 'for key in ("XML:com.adobe.xmp", "xmp"): if key in exif_image.info: for pattern in (...):' loop, around lines 725-740) to fix TypeError when XMP value is a tuple. New code assigns 'value' via if/elif/else (str/tuple/bytes) then sets exif_image.info[key] = value. Also added test_exif_transpose_with_xmp_tuple() in Tests/test_imageops.py right before test_exif_transpose_xml_without_xmp(). If your logging feature touches the same function, please add your logging around/outside this block rather than reverting my tuple-handling change, to avoid clobbering. Happy to share my diff if useful.
